key.name: override-restrictions
key.description: Override document restrictions, like restriction to copy or to print.

key.name: auto-reload
key.description: Whether the document is automatically reloaded on file change.

key.name: document-directory
key.summary: The URI of the directory last used to open or save a document.

key.name: pictures-directory
key.summary: The URI of the directory last used to save a picture.

key.name: page-cache-size
key.description: The maximum size that will be used to cache rendered pages, limits maximum zoom level.

key.name: show-caret-navigation-message
key.summary: Show a dialog to confirm that the user wants to activate the caret navigation.

key.name: show-sidebar
key.description: Whether to show the side pane.

key.name: window-ratio
key.description: The default width and height ratio of the window.

key.name: sizing-mode
key.description: The default page sizing mode: "fit-page", "fit-width", or "free".

key.name: zoom
key.description: The default zoom level when sizing mode is set to "free".

key.name: inverted-colors
key.description: Whether to display documents with inverted colors.

key.name: dual-page
key.description: Whether to show two pages side by side.

key.name: dual-page-odd-left
key.summary: Odd pages on the left in dual page mode
key.description: Whether to place odd-numbered pages on the left side in dual page mode.

key.name: fullscreen
key.description: Whether to open the document in fullscreen mode.

key.name: sidebar-page
key.description: The default sidebar page to show.

key.name: sidebar-size
key.description: The default width of the side pane in pixels.
